# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:20.04

# Set environment variables
ENV NODE_VERSION 16.x

# Install system utilities
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y curl && \
    apt-get install -y git && \
    apt-get install -y build-essential && \
    apt-get install -y python3 && \
    apt-get install -y libssl-dev && \
    apt-get clean

# Install Node.js
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_$NODE_VERSION.x.x -o nodesource_setup.sh && \
    bash nodesource_setup.sh && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm nodesource_setup.sh

# Set the working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package.json and package-lock.json
COPY package*.json ./

# Install application dependencies
RUN npm install

# Copy application source code
COPY . .

# Expose the application port
EXPOSE 3000

# Start the application
CMD ["npm", "start"]
